title: Cross Guild Dreams of the One Piece
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Sabo, Unknown person #3, Cobra, Vivi as World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.
scene: World events shift toward Cross Guild, Sabo’s account of the Levely, Cobra’s death, Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionary Army’s next move.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No rain norainbow

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And so, the curtains drew closed on the reverie...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The fallout from Levely...?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...before the news of King cobra's murder came to light.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: This is Princess VIVI of Arabbasta!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hasn't anyone seen her?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Where is the King?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Has his condition worsened?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All the while, a number of stowaways held their breath...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...As they attempted to escape on various Royal vessels.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey!! whose ship is this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The Aegis King- Dom's.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We're on Aegis' ship, Morgans!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: gotcha. We'll fly our headquarters over and pretend to look for a scoop.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Use that chance to hop aboard, and don't get yourselves caught before then!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I owe you one....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You got that right!! A King somehow became the sub- ject of a manhunt. This is big news!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't wait to hear all about it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So... what exactly did you see in there, WAPOL?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Like I'd tell you!! Leave me alone and go back to your own ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't! CPO is no joke! Now that they're after me, it won't matter how much everyone tries to help, those agents won't rest till I'm back in their custody....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now let me borrow your transgender snail! I need to talk to my father as soon as possible...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He's a total worry- want!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: anything but that!! Get lost already!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What's Wrong With You?!

summary: This part advances the Cross Guild and Reverie Truth through 25 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
